risks.summary: Project-specific validation was not defined beyond the starter strategy.
risks.mitigation: VALSTRAT-002 now defines Phase 1 search, explain, evaluation, security, performance, deployment, and MDE checks.

risks.summary: Phase 1 public acceptance depends on external OpenSearch and Cloudflare configuration.
risks.mitigation: GEN-003 loaded and evaluated the live cranfield-v0 OpenSearch index; GEN-004 configured Worker secrets, deployed Cloudflare, and verified public endpoints.
